mapper.select: select id, username from tb_customer where tel = #{identity}
select id, username, password from tb_customer where username = #{identity}
select id, username, password from tb_customer where id = #{customerId}

SELECT c.id, c.username, c.name, c.sex, c.tel, c.email, c.photo, c.create_time, a.id AS address_id, a.name AS address_name, a.tel AS address_tel, a.province, a.city, a.district, a.region_code, a.detail, a.is_default FROM tb_customer c LEFT JOIN tb_address a ON c.id = a.customer_id WHERE c.id = #{customerId} order by a.is_default DESC, address_id DESC
mapper.update: update tb_customer set tel = #{identity} where id = #{customerId}
update tb_customer set password = #{newPassword} where id = #{customerId}
update tb_customer set photo = #{path} where id = #{customerId}
